notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Marcell Ozuna out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.
